name: get_zone_details
description: Retrieves detailed configuration and capabilities information for a specific heating zone, including device information, temperature control ranges, heating system type, device serial numbers, battery status, firmware versions, mounting state, and zone-specific technical specifications. Provides comprehensive zone metadata including supported features like open window detection and dazzle mode, needed for advanced zone configuration and compatibility checking.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home/installation

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone/room
